post.title: July Monthly Outlook, Vol of vol supply, Momentum - Equilibrium + Weekly post (07-11/July)
post.subtitle: Momentum, Market Equilibrium, Bias, July positioning, Vol dynamics, Weekly expected dynamics, My trading strat
post.description: Momentum, Market Equilibrium, Bias, July positioning, Vol dynamics, Weekly expected dynamics, My trading strat
post.truncated_body_text: Bearmarket odds have decreased drastically for now, even tho the risk is still not 0%. Note, that August - Sept window is still a pivot, but probability is lower. The reason is not the momentum but strictly the sentiment, because we can see that the market is aggressively held-up, and very much likely that it will remain so until the problems get solved even only on paper. Then the market will rebalance itself just like as it did after 2021.
